transcript.text: Feels like it should be farther along than Tuesday, but off tomorrow.
Uh, and a full weekend to three days.
But we'll be out in San Francisco next week, meeting with the team.
I have to go out in a couple weeks to do the same thing.
Where do you base that again?
I was just like, yeah, you get a holiday Tuesday.
So I know you've got quite a few blogs on your end for review.
The one that you did leave feedback on, like, the team's going to try to work with the writing guidelines to make it more conversationally toned to remove that kind of AI voice.
And then they've created a post-processing checklist to hopefully alleviate some of that tone that it came across in that first one.
So for this week's articles, we've got five new ones in flight.
We'll have to get on it.
Yeah, they're going to start backing up.
But I think with the holiday, like, we'll probably have them, some of the teams, again, not U.S.-based.
We'll probably have them, like, Thursday or Friday, but Ada should be sending us over when they're ready later this week.
And then how does that work with, like, the winter holiday season?
Like, do we want to reduce the volume during that time just so that I have time to catch up?
Or what's, like, generally the way that this works?
I wasn't here for the holidays last year.
But I think we definitely could kind of slow down, especially for the Christmas week, because a lot of people will be out that week.

So I think if we can keep with the current steady state and then just plan for that week of Christmas to probably pause or reduce drastically, whatever works best with you, I think I'm open to suggestions there.
I guess I'll see what I can
If done before then, then we can judge if we need to pause.
I mean, I'd obviously rather not, but like, is this a normal process?
Like, is it usually a bottleneck with an internal reviewer or am I just an outlier?
No, it's, there's definitely, like, we have some teams that have multiple people reviewing them, which obviously helps for speed a little bit, but I wouldn't say this is atypical.
We have one client that has, I think, 12 articles that they haven't even reviewed one yet.

So I'd say, especially during the sprint, like, while we're figuring out the motion of, like, the review process and kind of calibrating on voice tone and overall kind of depth and accuracy, we do run into this quite a bit.
Yeah, I figured, like, as everyone gets used to the style that we're trying to do, it'll speed up review on my end, so.
We're coming this week, so I should try to get on that.
And then I did see those brand guidelines you shared, so Katya is going to work on updating the image pipeline and then come up with those two different versions, two different sizes.
Is there ever a revisitation of the information that we did with Discovery, like brand guidelines and all that?
Do we ever recalibrate at some point just to check back in and make sure that we're putting the right stuff into the system?
Um, we've some, I mean, one client right now we have is like putting full stop on production to go recalibrate just because like their product marketing team was involved in the initial calibration.
And once we started pushing out content.
And they're like, this doesn't align with how we talk about our product.
I'm like, well, that's an issue.
So yeah, we have had a kind of recalibration where we just pause if there's like a big issue.

But I think for the most part, if you include like new information or if there's just a different way you guys want to position like you.com or any of your products, that's something we can kind of do on the fly.
If to revisit or like if we bring other team members on, they might have their own thoughts.
I will definitely jump on a bunch of these and try to review quickly.
And then I just realized that I still owe you a recording of Scrunch.
If also when you do Scrunch.
Possible to do a Looker one as well.
That would be really helpful to send to the team.
And that's all reliant on like RGA and Search Console and all of that, right?
We're trying to like recalibrate and make sure that that's tagged and everything correctly.
So if stuff does change in Looker, that is why.
I'm going to see if I can get Ada to do this one when she's back tomorrow, just because she's much better at knowing where the sources are coming from.
I mean, no one's in this week, so no rush.
So I will get you those.
And then we are at week seven.
And so there is a decision point for next week if you guys want to continue with GrowthX coming we can end it at the strategy,
So up to you guys to make that decision.
We'll just need to know by next week.
I believe I put in a request to continue to rollover.
So we should be good to go.
So that should be coming through.
I will at least give verbal to my team so they know.
So those are the updates we got for you this week.
Happy to give you 20 minutes back if you want to jump into those blogs.
If there's anything that you need other than obviously me reviewing, let me know.
But yeah, having Scrunch walkthrough would be great.
And we do use Brandlight still, and they did a walkthrough with their platform.
So I don't know if at some point it would be helpful to like merge the two and maybe have everyone get on the same.
And call just so we can make sure all the information is aligning.

Yeah, I think one thing that would be super helpful, if you guys have prompts that you track in Brandlight that you like and want to continue tracking, like if you could share that list with us and we can upload those to Scrunch.
Just so have like parity of what we're tracking.
Yeah, I can see if I can actually get that GrowthX email access to Brandlight, if that is helpful.
But I can also get, just try to download what I can.
Yeah, see if you can download, just because I don't know if that team account will work.
I think we've got like 100-ish prompts for tracking in Scrunch, that updated list I shared.
Either way, I'll do the full video walkthrough so you guys have more context of, like, what's actually going on on this platform.
I just thought they provided, like, a report with Insights from our last call with Brandlight.
So I'm just going to put that in the channel, the GrowthX channel now.
But whatever, like, specific stuff I'll pull for you, too.
Well, have a great holiday week.
Hopefully you get some time off.
We will see you next week.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, review process, and project status.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 5 new articles are ready for review, adding to the current backlog. To manage holiday capacity, content production will be paused or reduced during Christmas week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Review Process:** To address feedback on an "AI voice," GrowthX will refine writing guidelines and implement a post-processing checklist. The current review bottleneck is a common issue during initial sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Project Status:** You.com has requested a project rollover, confirming the engagement will continue past the initial strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Brooke will share Brandlight prompts with Erik to create parity with Scrunch tracking. Erik will provide video walkthroughs for both Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of articles exists, with 5 more arriving this week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Context:** This is a common issue in early sprints as teams calibrate on voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Solution:** To manage holiday capacity, content production will be paused or reduced during Christmas week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Content Quality & Process Improvement

  - [**Feedback:** The first reviewed article had an "AI voice."](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will refine writing guidelines and implement a post-processing checklist to ensure a more conversational tone.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Brand Guidelines:** Katya will update the image pipeline to produce two versions in different sizes, per the shared guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Tooling & Reporting

  - [**Video Walkthroughs:** Erik will provide recordings for Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Ada will likely record the Looker video due to her expertise with the data sources (RGA, Search Console).](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Note:** Looker data may change as You.com recalibrates its tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Tool Parity:** To align tracking, Brooke will download and share Brandlight prompts with Erik for upload to Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Project Continuation

  - [**Decision Point:** Week 7 requires a decision on continuing the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Status:** You.com has already requested a project rollover via its contracts manager.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Review the current article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Download and share Brandlight prompts with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [Provide video walkthroughs for Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Inform the GrowthX team of the project rollover.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

action_items.description: Review 5 new articles when Ada sends them
Record Scrunch walkthrough for Brooke; include Looker walkthrough if possible
Export Brandlight prompts; share w/ Erik for Scrunch upload
